aide.name: AI-Driven Engineering (AIDE)
aide.description: A structured 7-step workflow for building new projects from scratch with AI assistants — from vision through implementation.
aide.author: mnriem

agent-assign.name: Agent Assign
agent-assign.description: Assign specialized Claude Code agents to spec-kit tasks for targeted execution
agent-assign.author: xuyang

architect-preview.name: Architect Impact Previewer
architect-preview.description: Predicts architectural impact, complexity, and risks of proposed changes before implementation.
architect-preview.author: Umme Habiba

archive.name: Archive Extension
archive.description: Archive merged features into main project memory, resolving gaps and conflicts.
archive.author: Stanislav Deviatov

azure-devops.name: Azure DevOps Integration
azure-devops.description: Sync user stories and tasks to Azure DevOps work items using OAuth authentication.
azure-devops.author: pragya247

blueprint.name: Blueprint
blueprint.description: Stay code-literate in AI-driven development: review a complete code blueprint for every task from spec artifacts before /speckit.implement runs
blueprint.author: chordpli

branch-convention.name: Branch Convention
branch-convention.description: Configurable branch and folder naming conventions for /specify with presets and custom patterns.
branch-convention.author: Quratulain-bilal

brownfield.name: Brownfield Bootstrap
brownfield.description: Bootstrap spec-kit for existing codebases — auto-discover architecture and adopt SDD incrementally.
brownfield.author: Quratulain-bilal

bugfix.name: Bugfix Workflow
bugfix.description: Structured bugfix workflow — capture bugs, trace to spec artifacts, and patch specs surgically.
bugfix.author: Quratulain-bilal

canon.name: Canon
canon.description: Adds canon-driven (baseline-driven) workflows: spec-first, code-first, spec-drift. Requires Canon Core preset installation.
canon.author: Maxim Stupakov

catalog-ci.name: Catalog CI
catalog-ci.description: Automated validation for spec-kit community catalog entries — structure, URLs, diffs, and linting.
catalog-ci.author: Quratulain-bilal

ci-guard.name: CI Guard
ci-guard.description: Spec compliance gates for CI/CD — verify specs exist, check drift, and block merges on gaps.
ci-guard.author: Quratulain-bilal

checkpoint.name: Checkpoint Extension
checkpoint.description: An extension to commit the changes made during the middle of the implementation, so you don't end up with just one very large commit at the end.
checkpoint.author: aaronrsun

cleanup.name: Cleanup Extension
cleanup.description: Post-implementation quality gate that reviews changes, fixes small issues (scout rule), creates tasks for medium issues, and generates analysis for large issues.
cleanup.author: dsrednicki

conduct.name: Conduct Extension
conduct.description: Executes a single spec-kit phase via sub-agent delegation to reduce context pollution.
conduct.author: twbrandon7

critique.name: Spec Critique Extension
critique.description: Dual-lens critical review of spec and plan from product strategy and engineering risk perspectives.
critique.author: arunt14

confluence.name: Confluence Extension
confluence.description: Create, read, and update Confluence docs for your project
confluence.author: aaronrsun

diagram.name: Spec Diagram
diagram.description: Auto-generate Mermaid diagrams of SDD workflow state, feature progress, and task dependencies.
diagram.author: Quratulain-bilal

docguard.name: DocGuard — CDD Enforcement
docguard.description: Canonical-Driven Development enforcement. Validates, scores, and traces project documentation with automated checks, AI-driven workflows, and spec-kit hooks. Zero NPM runtime dependencies.
docguard.author: raccioly

doctor.name: Project Health Check
doctor.description: Diagnose a Spec Kit project and report health issues across structure, agents, features, scripts, extensions, and git.
doctor.author: KhawarHabibKhan

extensify.name: Extensify
extensify.description: Create and validate extensions and extension catalogs.
extensify.author: mnriem

fix-findings.name: Fix Findings
fix-findings.description: Automated analyze-fix-reanalyze loop that resolves spec findings until clean.
fix-findings.author: Quratulain-bilal

fixit.name: FixIt Extension
fixit.description: Spec-aware bug fixing: maps bugs to spec artifacts, proposes a plan, applies minimal changes.
fixit.author: ismaelJimenez

fleet.name: Fleet Orchestrator
fleet.description: Orchestrate a full feature lifecycle with human-in-the-loop gates across all SpecKit phases.
fleet.author: sharathsatish

github-issues.name: GitHub Issues Integration 1
github-issues.description: Generate spec artifacts from GitHub Issues - import issues, sync updates, and maintain bidirectional traceability
github-issues.author: Fatima367

issue.name: GitHub Issues Integration 2
issue.description: Creates and syncs local specs based on an existing issue in GitHub
issue.author: aaronrsun

iterate.name: Iterate
iterate.description: Iterate on spec documents with a two-phase define-and-apply workflow — refine specs mid-implementation and go straight back to building
iterate.author: Vianca Martinez

jira.name: Jira Integration
jira.description: Create Jira Epics, Stories, and Issues from spec-kit specifications and task breakdowns with configurable hierarchy and custom field support.
jira.author: mbachorik

learn.name: Learning Extension
learn.description: Generate educational guides from implementations and enhance clarifications with mentoring context.
learn.author: Vianca Martinez

maqa.name: MAQA — Multi-Agent & Quality Assurance
maqa.description: Coordinator → feature → QA agent workflow with parallel worktree-based implementation. Language-agnostic. Auto-detects installed board plugins (Trello, Linear, GitHub Projects, Jira, Azure DevOps). Optional CI gate.
maqa.author: GenieRobot

maqa-azure-devops.name: MAQA Azure DevOps Integration
maqa-azure-devops.description: Azure DevOps Boards integration for the MAQA extension. Populates work items from specs, moves User Stories across columns as features progress, real-time Task child ticking.
maqa-azure-devops.author: GenieRobot

maqa-ci.name: MAQA CI/CD Gate
maqa-ci.description: CI/CD pipeline gate for the MAQA extension. Auto-detects GitHub Actions, CircleCI, GitLab CI, and Bitbucket Pipelines. Blocks QA handoff until pipeline is green.
maqa-ci.author: GenieRobot

maqa-github-projects.name: MAQA GitHub Projects Integration
maqa-github-projects.description: GitHub Projects v2 integration for the MAQA extension. Populates draft issues from specs, moves items across Status columns as features progress, real-time task list ticking.
maqa-github-projects.author: GenieRobot

maqa-jira.name: MAQA Jira Integration
maqa-jira.description: Jira integration for the MAQA extension. Populates Stories from specs, moves issues across board columns as features progress, real-time Subtask ticking.
maqa-jira.author: GenieRobot

maqa-linear.name: MAQA Linear Integration
maqa-linear.description: Linear integration for the MAQA extension. Populates issues from specs, moves items across workflow states as features progress, real-time sub-issue ticking.
maqa-linear.author: GenieRobot

maqa-trello.name: MAQA Trello Integration
maqa-trello.description: Trello board integration for the MAQA extension. Populates board from specs, moves cards between lists as features progress, real-time checklist ticking.
maqa-trello.author: GenieRobot

memorylint.name: MemoryLint
memorylint.description: Agent memory governance tool: Automatically audits and fixes boundary conflicts between AGENTS.md and the constitution.
memorylint.author: RbBtSn0w

onboard.name: Onboard
onboard.description: Contextual onboarding and progressive growth for developers new to spec-kit projects. Explains specs, maps dependencies, validates understanding, and guides the next step.
onboard.author: Rafael Sales

optimize.name: Optimize Extension
optimize.description: Audits and optimizes AI governance for context efficiency
optimize.author: sakitA

plan-review-gate.name: Plan Review Gate
plan-review-gate.description: Require spec.md and plan.md to be merged via MR/PR before allowing task generation
plan-review-gate.author: luno

pr-bridge.name: PR Bridge
pr-bridge.description: Auto-generate pull request descriptions, checklists, and summaries from spec artifacts.
pr-bridge.author: Quratulain-bilal

presetify.name: Presetify
presetify.description: Create and validate presets and preset catalogs.
presetify.author: mnriem

product-forge.name: Product Forge
product-forge.description: Full product lifecycle: research → product spec → SpecKit → implement → verify → test
product-forge.author: VaiYav

qa.name: QA Testing Extension
qa.description: Systematic QA testing with browser-driven or CLI-based validation of acceptance criteria from spec.
qa.author: arunt14

ralph.name: Ralph Loop
ralph.description: Autonomous implementation loop using AI agent CLI.
ralph.author: Rubiss

reconcile.name: Reconcile Extension
reconcile.description: Reconcile implementation drift by surgically updating the feature's own spec, plan, and tasks.
reconcile.author: Stanislav Deviatov

refine.name: Spec Refine
refine.description: Update specs in-place, propagate changes to plan and tasks, and diff impact across artifacts.
refine.author: Quratulain-bilal

repoindex.name: Repository Index
repoindex.description: Generate index of your repo for overview, architecture and module
repoindex.author: Yiyu Liu

retro.name: Retro Extension
retro.description: Sprint retrospective analysis with metrics, spec accuracy assessment, and improvement suggestions.
retro.author: arunt14

retrospective.name: Retrospective Extension
retrospective.description: Post-implementation retrospective with spec adherence scoring, drift analysis, and human-gated spec updates.
retrospective.author: emi-dm

review.name: Review Extension
review.description: Post-implementation comprehensive code review with specialized agents for code quality, comments, tests, error handling, type design, and simplification.
review.author: ismaelJimenez

scope.name: Spec Scope
scope.description: Effort estimation and scope tracking — estimate work, detect creep, and budget time per phase.
scope.author: Quratulain-bilal

security-review.name: Security Review
security-review.description: Comprehensive security audit of codebases using AI-powered DevSecOps analysis
security-review.author: DyanGalih

sf.name: SFSpeckit — Salesforce Spec-Driven Development
sf.description: Enterprise-Grade Spec-Driven Development (SDD) Framework for Salesforce.
sf.author: Sumanth Yanamala

ship.name: Ship Release Extension
ship.description: Automates release pipeline: pre-flight checks, branch sync, changelog generation, CI verification, and PR creation.
ship.author: arunt14

speckit-utils.name: SDD Utilities
speckit-utils.description: Resume interrupted workflows, validate project health, and verify spec-to-task traceability.
speckit-utils.author: mvanhorn

spectest.name: SpecTest
spectest.description: Auto-generate test scaffolds from spec criteria, map coverage, and find untested requirements.
spectest.author: Quratulain-bilal

staff-review.name: Staff Review Extension
staff-review.description: Staff-engineer-level code review that validates implementation against spec, checks security, performance, and test coverage.
staff-review.author: arunt14

status.name: Project Status
status.description: Show current SDD workflow progress — active feature, artifact status, task completion, workflow phase, and extensions summary.
status.author: KhawarHabibKhan

status-report.name: Status Report
status-report.description: Project status, feature progress, and next-action recommendations for spec-driven workflows.
status-report.author: Open-Agent-Tools

superb.name: Superpowers Bridge
superb.description: Orchestrates obra/superpowers skills within the spec-kit SDD workflow. Thin bridge commands delegate to superpowers' authoritative SKILL.md files at runtime (with graceful fallback), while bridge-original commands provide spec-kit-native value. Eight commands cover the full lifecycle: intent clarification, TDD enforcement, task review, verification, critique, systematic debugging, branch completion, and review response. Hook-bound commands fire automatically; standalone commands are invoked when needed.
superb.author: rbbtsn0w

sync.name: Spec Sync
sync.description: Detect and resolve drift between specs and implementation. AI-assisted resolution with human approval.
sync.author: bgervin

tinyspec.name: TinySpec
tinyspec.description: Lightweight single-file workflow for small tasks — skip the heavy multi-step SDD process.
tinyspec.author: Quratulain-bilal

v-model.name: V-Model Extension Pack
v-model.description: Enforces V-Model paired generation of development specs and test specs with full traceability.
v-model.author: leocamello

verify.name: Verify Extension
verify.description: Post-implementation quality gate that validates implemented code against specification artifacts.
verify.author: ismaelJimenez

verify-tasks.name: Verify Tasks Extension
verify-tasks.description: Detect phantom completions: tasks marked [X] in tasks.md with no real implementation.
verify-tasks.author: Dave Sharpe

whatif.name: What-if Analysis
whatif.description: Preview the downstream impact (complexity, effort, tasks, risks) of requirement changes before committing to them.
whatif.author: DevAbdullah90

worktree.name: Worktree Isolation
worktree.description: Spawn isolated git worktrees for parallel feature development without checkout switching.
worktree.author: Quratulain-bilal

worktrees.name: Worktrees
worktrees.description: Default-on worktree isolation for parallel agents — sibling or nested layout
worktrees.author: dango85
